steps.title: Production Core review evaluation
steps.outputTail:
Production Core Review Evaluation
=================================
Review ID: REVIEW-ProductionCore-Readiness-001
Gate: GATE-REVIEW-001

New status: Changes Requested

Criteria report: docs/Production_Core_Review_Criteria.md
Resolved changes:
  - PCORE-APPROVAL-GRAPH: Production graph is classified as Operational.
  - PCORE-APPROVAL-CONTAMINATION: No blocked ExampleGraph contamination remains in operational release gates.
  - PCORE-APPROVAL-CONSOLE: Operational evidence reports zero Unity console errors.
  - PCORE-APPROVAL-EVIDENCE: Latest smoke evidence is non-sample Operational Passed evidence.
  - PCORE-APPROVAL-HARNESS: Latest live harness report has a Passed Operational scenario; fixed smoke evidence remains available for the core gate.
Remaining changes:
  - PCORE-APPROVAL-BRIDGE: Unity Bridge health is not passed in both doctor and operational evidence. -> Open Unity, start the canonical Unity Bridge server, rerun doctor, then rerun the operational smoke harness.
  - PCORE-APPROVAL-COMPILE: Unity compile status is not passed in both doctor and operational evidence. -> Resolve Unity compile errors and rerun doctor plus the operational smoke harness.
  - PCORE-APPROVAL-PRODUCTIZATION: Productization still reports core blockers other than the review gate. -> Resolve non-review productization blockers and regenerate the productization report.
  - PCORE-APPROVAL-RELEASE: Release readiness still has non-review blockers. -> Resolve non-review release blockers and regenerate release readiness.
